tracks.meaning: the shared beliefs, values, customs, and practices of a society or group
the growth of microorganisms such as bacteria or cells in a controlled environment
the process of developing flavors in food through fermentation, aging, or cooking techniques
the practice of cultivating plants or raising animals for food production
the refinement of tastes, manners, and intellectual interests through education and experience
the act of developing or nurturing something such as a skill, habit, or relationship

the creative and intellectual achievements of a society including music, literature, and visual art
the distinctive identity, values, and way of doing things within an organization
